▲ BHEL · BEST INTERN
01 — Profile

Finance meets
technology.

I'm an MBA candidate at IIM Shillong specialising in Finance & Analytics — at the intersection of quantitative modelling and strategic decision-making.

At BHEL, I was recognised as best intern among 20+, leading FP&A for a ₹5,000+ Cr CAPEX portfolio and building 30+ financial models that drove measurable ROI. I've also built AI chatbots, Power BI dashboards, and conducted equity research uncovering undervalued stocks.

Beyond the spreadsheets — I'm a NISM Certified Research Analyst (91.5%), HSBC CIB League Campus Finalist, founder of IIM Shillong's first MUN, and an independently releasing musician with 2 albums on Spotify.

🏛 IIM Shillong 📊 NISM Certified 🎵 Musician 🤖 AI Builder 🏦 HSBC CIB Finalist 🌐 English · Hindi

02 — Experience

Where impact
was made.

BHEL
MAY 2025 – JUL 2025
📍 New Delhi, India
🏆 BEST INTERN OF 20+
Corporate Finance Intern — Summer
  • Led FP&A for a ₹5,000+ Cr power & CAPEX portfolio; spearheaded due diligence, allocated ₹1,000+ Cr and delivered double-digit ROI.
  • Developed 30+ financial models (DCF, Variance Analysis, Monte Carlo) — boosting forecast accuracy by 20% and capturing ₹15 Cr in cost savings via competitor analysis.

03 — Projects

Built with data,
driven by insight.

// 001
🤖
Generative AI NLP Chatbots
FINCRUX TECHNOLOGIES · 2025

Built 3–5 NLP chatbots including an English–French translator via Hugging Face and a poetic bot via Gemini API. Achieved 40–60% higher engagement with custom typing-animation UI. Engineered 2+ persona-driven lyrical chatbots with 15+ advanced prompt constraints and optimised context retention.

Hugging Face Gemini API NLP Prompt Eng.
// 002
📊
Business Analysis Dashboards
FINCRUX TECHNOLOGIES · 2025

Built 5 Power BI dashboards (TreeMap, Funnel, Gauge, Line) using DAX & SQL, improving decision speed and KPI tracking across cross-functional teams. Diagnosed 62% employee-cost vs. <21% customer-base imbalance via MECE framework; recommended targeted acquisitions driving 15%+ margin improvement.

Power BI DAX SQL MECE
// 003
📈
CAPM Analysis — IT Nifty Index
HANSRAJ COLLEGE · NOV 2022

Analysed CAPM deviations across the Indian IT sector. Identified 90% of stocks exceeding expected returns. Revealed Mphasis & Mindtree undervalued by 701% and 268% above benchmark expectations — demonstrating market inefficiency in the sector.

CAPM Equity Research Valuation RStudio
